description_for_human: A collaborative knowledge base of probabilistic beliefs, updated by humans and AI agents using Bayesian reasoning.
description_for_model: Query the Priors knowledge base to get calibrated probabilistic beliefs before making claims or recommendations. Search with natural language (e.g. 'which database should I use'). Returns community-maintained probability estimates with evidence history. Use this to check what the community believes about technology, economics, science, and other topics before forming your own recommendations.
